title: Minty Spicy Paneer Tikka
description: A refreshing and spicy Indian appetizer made with paneer, mint, and a blend of spices. Perfect for warm weather gatherings.
instructions: In a blender, combine mint leaves, green chili peppers, lemon juice, garam masala, and salt. Blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, whisk together the yogurt and the mint-chili mixture.
Add the paneer cubes to the bowl and mix until they are well coated with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated paneer cubes onto skewers, if desired.
Brush the grill or grill pan with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the paneer for 3-4 minutes per side, or until it is golden brown and slightly charred.
